params.prompt: Photorealistic editorial interior reference photograph of a Dine (dining). Focus tightly on: dining table, pendant light above the dining area, dining chairs, round oak table, woven rattan pendant, three-panel bay windows, minimal ceramic vignette, 4 linen chairs, minimal ceramic tableware. Styled in japandi aesthetic, warm_neutral palette, soft_ambient lighting. Calm, textured Japandi interiors that balance Scandinavian lightness with Japanese restraint. Warm neutrals, light oak, and natural textiles create an uncluttered, family-friendly environment. Prioritize a cozy standing-desk work corner near natural light, low-profile furniture, and subtle plant accents. Preserve all measured architecture and floorplan flow—styling should enhance the existing layout rather than restructure it. This image is a visual consistency reference — every detail of the featured furniture and fixtures must be clearly visible and precisely rendered. No people. No visible brand logos. Sharp architectural photography. Luxury real estate staging.
